_comment: Example MCP config for Roblox Studio integration. This is a template - you need a compatible Roblox MCP server.
_tools_provided: roblox_execute_luau - Execute Luau code in Studio command bar
_setup_instructions: 1. Install a Roblox MCP server: npm install -g roblox-mcp-server
2. Set ROBLOX_PLACE_FILE to your .rbxlx or .rbxl file
3. Optionally set ROBLOX_API_KEY for Open Cloud features
4. Ensure Roblox Studio is running with the place open
5. Add this config to your Claude Code MCP settings
